## Logging.LogReporter.createDefault() method

Creates a default [LogReporter](./ts-utils.logging.logreporter.md) with a [NoOpLogger](./ts-utils.logging.nooplogger.md) with the supplied parameters, returning both the logger and reporter.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static createDefault(logger?: ILogger): Result<LogReporter<unknown>>;
```

logger

_(Optional)_ Optional logger to use; defaults to a new [NoOpLogger](./ts-utils.logging.nooplogger.md) if not provided.


</td></tr>
